title: Crystal Anchor Counter
description: HUD Counter Displays real-time CPS (Crystals per Second) and APS (Anchors per Second) shows anchor ticks and More!,
body:
**Crystal Anchor Counter**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow) [![Source](https://img.shields.io/badge/Source-181717?logo=github&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/cutebow/Crystal-Anchor-Counter)
--- A mod that tracks your Crystal CPS and Respawn Anchor APS in real time. Perfect for PvP players who want precise feedback to improve consistency and study their gameplay. It also includes an Average Mode, letting you view your average crystals/anchors per second or both at once. Check out my other mod: [Custom Anchors Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-anchors) 1.21.11 out now! **UPDATE** - More hud options - Custom themes + animated ones - Position editor - Consistency HUD Info - Timings between actions Crystals/anchors - time it takes from placing an anchor to exploding it in ms - and more! Note: This mod doesn’t give unfair advantages and only tracks actions you could count manually in vanilla. Still, check with server staff before using it in tierlist or competitive tests. ---
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jDwAl78q/images/d3094ff92629b3296e665430bf44ffc0780492f8.gif) _This is live mode (the counter resets every second, Avg mode is if you want it to show your avg_
--- If you would like to help support the development of this mod - https://ko-fi.com/cutebow 1.21.11 - 1.20 Live HUD Counter Real-time CPS (Crystals per Second) and APS (Anchors per Second). Customizable Display Change colors, themes (including rainbow), format, and screen position. Quick HUD Toggle Command /counter or /cac — includes full tab completions - the command doesn't have as many options as the Mod menu screen does. --- **All the themes** ![All the different themes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jDwAl78q/images/bd52d6b88658b2ea8d9ab083d1880d5759876b9d.gif) [![Follow me!](https://img.shields.io/badge/Follow%20me!-💕-pink?style=flat)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow) [![NameMC](https://img.shields.io/badge/namemc-cutebow-ffb6c1?style=flat&logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow)
